lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਮਿਟੀ ਅੰਧੁ ਹੈ ਪਉਣੈ ਪੁਛਹੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa mittee andh hai paunai puchhahu jaae |
lines.english: The body is merely blind dust; go, and ask the soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਤਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿਆ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵਾ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: hau taa maaeaa mohiaa fir fir aavaa jaae |
lines.english: The soul answers, "I am enticed by Maya, and so I come and go, again and again."

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਤੋ ਖਸਮ ਕਾ ਜਿ ਰਹਾ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak hukam na jaato khasam kaa ji rahaa sach samaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, I do not know my Lord and Master's Command, by which I would merge in the Truth. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਧਨ ਕਉ ਤਸਕਰੁ ਜੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਕਈ ਨਾ ਓਚਕਾ ਲੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eis dhan kau tasakar johi na sakee naa ochakaa lai jaae |
lines.english: Thieves cannot steal this wealth, nor can robbers take it away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਨਿਹਚਲ ਨਾਮ ਧਨੁ ਹੋਰੁ ਧਨੁ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eko nihachal naam dhan hor dhan aavai jaae |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is the only permanent wealth; all other wealth comes and goes.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਈਐ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਪਲੈ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: poore gur te paaeeai manamukh palai na paae |
lines.english: It is obtained from the Perfect Guru; the self-willed manmukhs do not receive it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਜੀਐ ਸੇਤੀ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਜੀਐ ਨਾਲੇ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu har dhan jeeai setee rav rahiaa jeeai naale jaae |
lines.english: This wealth of the Lord is embedded in the soul, and with the soul, it shall depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਅਤਿ ਵਡਾ ਸਚੁ ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: meraa saahib at vaddaa sach gahir ganbheeraa |
lines.english: My Master is so very great, true, profound and unfathomable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਵਾਪਾਰੀ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਿਨੑਾ ਨਾਮ ਧਨੁ ਖਟਿਆ ਆਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dhan vaapaaree naanakaa jinaa naam dhan khattiaa aae |2|
lines.english: Blessed are the traders, O Nanak, who have come to earn the wealth of the Naam. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਧਨੁ ਧੀਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee paaeeai nihachal dhan dheeraa |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the eternal wealth is obtained, bringing peace and patience to the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਤਿਸ ਕੈ ਵਸਿ ਹੈ ਸਭੁ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਚੀਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh jag tis kai vas hai sabh tis kaa cheeraa |
lines.english: The whole world is under His power; everything is the projection of Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣਵੰਤੀ ਸਾਲਾਹਿਆ ਸਦਾ ਥਿਰੁ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਪੂਰਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gunavantee saalaahiaa sadaa thir nihachal har pooraa |7|
lines.english: The virtuous praise the ever-stable, permanent, perfect Lord. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਭੇਟੈ ਗੁਰੁ ਸੂਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: kirapaa te har man vasai bhettai gur sooraa |
lines.english: By His Grace, the Lord dwells in the mind, and one meets the Brave Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਦਾ ਜੀਵਿਆ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਰਹਰਿ ਤਿਆਗਦੇ ਦੁਖੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਪਾਪ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dhrig tinaa daa jeeviaa jo har sukh parahar tiaagade dukh haumai paap kamaae |
lines.english: Cursed is the life of those who forsake and throw away the peace of the Lord's Name, and suffer pain instead by practicing ego and sin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਲਤਿ ਪਲਤਿ ਓਇ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਗਏ ਪਛੁਤਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: halat palat oe sukh na paaveh ant ge pachhutaae |
lines.english: In this world and in the world beyond, they do not find peace; in the end, they depart regretting and repenting.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਵਿਆਪੇ ਤਿਨੑ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਕਾਈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh agiaanee maaeaa mohi viaape tina boojh na kaaee paae |
lines.english: The ignorant self-willed manmukhs are engrossed in the love of Maya; they have no understanding at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੋ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਆਇ ਪਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jis poorab hovai likhiaa so gur charanee aae paae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who has such pre-ordained destiny, comes and falls at the Guru's Feet. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ਤਿਸੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee ko naam dhiaae tis haumai vichahu jaae |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one may meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and egotism departs from within him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਊਧਾ ਕਉਲੁ ਹੈ ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh aoodhaa kaul hai naa tis bhagat na naau |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is like the inverted lotus; he has neither devotional worship, nor the Lord's Name.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਅੰਦਰੁ ਚਿਤੁ ਨ ਭਿਜਈ ਮੁਖਿ ਫੀਕਾ ਆਲਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tis kaa andar chit na bhijee mukh feekaa aalaau |
lines.english: His consciousness is not softened within, and the words from his mouth are insipid.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਕਤੀ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਕੂੜੁ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਹੈ ਉਪਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sakatee andar varatadaa koorr tis kaa hai upaau |
lines.english: He remains engrossed in material wealth, and his efforts are false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਤੈ ਬਣਤ ਬਣਾਈ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਕੂੜੁ ਬੋਲਿ ਬੋਲਿ ਡੁਬੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤਰੇ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak karatai banat banaaee manamukh koorr bol bol ddube guramukh tare jap har naau |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Creator Lord has arranged things, so that the self-willed manmukhs are drowned by telling lies, while the Gurmukhs are saved by chanting the Lord's Name. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਧਰਮਿ ਰਲਾਏ ਨਾ ਰਲਨੑਿ ਓਨਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਕੂੜੁ ਸੁਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: oe dharam ralaae naa ralana onaa andar koorr suaau |
lines.english: He does not mingle with the righteous; within him are falsehood and selfishness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਬੂਝੇ ਵਡਾ ਫੇਰੁ ਪਇਆ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin boojhe vaddaa fer peaa fir aavai jaaee |
lines.english: Without understanding, one must wander around the cycle of reincarnation, and continue coming and going.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੀ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aapanee kirapaa kare gur paaeeai vichahu aap gavaaee |
lines.english: But if the Lord shows His Mercy, one finds the Guru, and ego is banished from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਨ ਕੀਤੀਆ ਅੰਤਿ ਗਇਆ ਪਛੁਤਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kee sevaa na keeteea ant geaa pachhutaaee |
lines.english: One who has not served the True Guru, shall depart regretting and repenting in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa saalaaheeai hiradai liv laaee |8|
lines.english: Forever and ever, praise Him with love in your heart. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਭੁਖ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਉਤਰੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: trisanaa bhukh vichahu utarai sukh vasai man aaee |
lines.english: Hunger and thirst depart from within, and peace comes to dwell in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਉਪਾਵਾ ਸਿਰਿ ਉਪਾਉ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa upaavaa sir upaau hai har naam paraapat hoe |
lines.english: Of all efforts, the supreme effort is the attainment of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਆਪਣਾ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਪੂਜੇ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: ji satigur seve aapanaa tis no pooje sabh koe |
lines.english: One who serves his True Guru, is worshipped by everyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸੀਤਲ ਸਾਤਿ ਵਸੈ ਜਪਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: antar seetal saat vasai jap hiradai sadaa sukh hoe |
lines.english: Peace and tranquility come to dwell within the mind; meditating within the heart, there comes a lasting peace.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਮਨ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸਿਖ ਸੁਣਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਗੁਣੀ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: e man gur kee sikh sun har paaveh gunee nidhaan |
lines.english: O mind, listen to the Guru's Teachings, and you shall obtain the treasure of virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਖਾਣਾ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੈਨਣਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਡਾਈ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: amrit khaanaa amrit painanaa naanak naam vaddaaee hoe |1|
lines.english: The Ambrosial Amrit is his food, and the Ambrosial Amrit is his clothes; O Nanak, through the Naam, the Name of the Lord, greatness is obtained. ||1||
